content:
# Thellier Method

**Summary**: A laboratory technique used to measure the intensity of the ancient magnetic field from rock samples.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-kaka|Kaka, 1993]] applied thellier-method to 92 NRM-TRM curves to determine paleo-intensities.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Most of the 92 NRM-TRM curves deviated from straight lines, making reliable intensity determination difficult for many samples. ([[1993-kaka|Kaka, 1993, p. 18]])
